## Summary

Describe the change and the finance, control or portfolio outcome it supports.

## Scope

- Models, marts or dashboard pages affected:
- Grain or semantic contract changed:
- Generated artifacts intentionally included:

## Validation

- [ ] `dbt parse --no-partial-parse`
- [ ] Relevant dbt build/tests
- [ ] `cd dashboard && npm run check` for dashboard changes
- [ ] Screenshot or visual review for UI changes

## Risk

Note any accepted limitation, migration concern or follow-up work.
